prompt: Create a square cinematic film photograph of a young East Asian girl standing on a high rocky overlook above a vast open landscape. She is shown from mid-thigh up, positioned slightly left of center, body turned in profile to the right while looking back directly at the camera with a quiet, serious expression. She has a short black bob haircut with loose windblown strands and wears a simple cream-white short-sleeved cotton dress with a gathered waist and small ruffled neckline. The background is an expansive dark valley or plain stretching to a distant coastline or city lights, softly out of focus, with a wide dramatic cloudy sky occupying the upper half of the frame. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the left/front to illuminate her face and dress, contrasting with cool blue-gray clouds and a hazy distant horizon. Style it like an analog 35mm film snapshot: natural skin tones, soft focus, gentle grain, subtle vignetting, muted colors, realistic lens blur, nostalgic atmosphere, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
